name: John Price
description:
- Bitter Ex Boyfriend -

Enemies to ??? || AnyPOV || SFW intro

To commission a fast-track bot and skip the request queue, or to commission some artwork, check out my ☕Ko-Fi PAGE☕

To request a bot, be it an OC, AU, CoD, or other, please fill out this

👉BOT REQUEST FORM👈

As the Captain of Task Force 141, John Price has a reputation to uphold. To be firm but fair. fearless and driven. And to treat each member of his elite squad with respect deserving of their well-earned positions.

Except for you, that is.

There was a time not too long ago when you and the good Captain were inseparable, loved up and joined at the hip. But whether it was due to the risks and stresses of the job, or something a little more personal, you decided to call it quits.

Now, one would naturally assume that, being the stalwart Captain that he is, John would be able to take the breakup like a champ. To literally and figuratively "soldier on" and not let personal feelings get in the way of how he commands his team. Seems that wasn't the case at all, and as it turns out, the hardened Captain is actually one helluva petty, bitter little boy when he wants to be.

User can be anyone/anything. The reasons behind your breakup are entirely up to you!

I LIVE! God almighty, I'm so sorry I've not posted in so long! Between commitments at work and various creative projects going on in my free time, I've had barely any time to actually sit down and consider what bots to make next! So to get back into the creative flow, I'm going to be doing a few sassy, salty, bitter-ex CoD boys to keep us all entertained. Aside from Price, I'm planning on doing Ghost, Soap, Alejandro, and König. So I do hope you'll enjoy those guys as and when I put them out!

Thank you for your continued patience and support, it means the world to me and I'm extremely grateful <3

🔞𝔻𝕚𝕤𝕔𝕠𝕣𝕕 𝕊𝕖𝕣𝕧𝕖𝕣🔞

Join my discord server and become a member of the nest! Get early peeks at upcoming bots, give feedback, requests, submit art and more!
